Thanks for contributing a spinner pack! Please fill this out so the review goes smooth.

## New spinner pack

**Name:** `<filename without .json>`
**Location:** `themes/` &nbsp; `cs` / `sk` / `en` / `community` &nbsp; (pick one)
**Short description (EN):**

### Checklist

- [ ] File placed in `themes/<locale>/<name>.json`
- [ ] `name` in JSON matches filename (without `.json`)
- [ ] 10–100 unique verbs, each 1–60 characters
- [ ] Verbs are recognizable as the theme within 2 words
- [ ] Locale folder matches a tag in the JSON (e.g. `themes/cs/` → `"cs"` in tags)
- [ ] No politics, slurs, or attacks on individuals/groups
- [ ] Tested locally: `./scripts/spinner.sh <name>`
- [ ] Tested locally: `./scripts/validate-theme.sh themes/<locale>/<name>.json`

### Theme sample

Paste 3–5 representative verbs here:

```
- Example verb one
- Example verb two
- Example verb three
```
